CustomObject.description: Platform event to trigger signer form-field writeback to the base record in system context. Published by the signature finalizer (TemplateSignaturePdfQueueable) only after the signed PDF is saved; consumed by DocGenFieldWritebackTrigger running as the Automated Process user. Carries only the request Id — the subscriber re-derives the writable field allowlist from the template config and re-checks FLS per field.
CustomObject.label: DocGen Field Writeback
